description: Move trailer mapping logic for stock movements from HPNS to Oracle. Test coverage for CDSM_RULE_MAP, TRAILER_REGEX_RULES, TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG, MNY_TXN_QUALFR, SBDI_MNY_TXN_QUALFR_SIS, and STCCCALQ_GG.

tests.title: Verify active REC_TP=7 rules exist in CDSM_RULE_MAP
tests.description: Ensure the trailer mapping lookup table has active stock movement rules (RECORD_TYPE=7) with future or null END_DT.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_rules
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND ACTV_F = 'Y'
  AND (END_DT IS NULL OR END_DT >= SYSDATE)

tests.title: Verify no duplicate CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID for REC_TP=7
tests.description: Each rule should have a unique CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
GROUP BY CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

tests.title: Verify every active rule has TXN_TP_CD or TXN_SBTP_CD
tests.description: Active trailer mapping rules must assign at least a transaction type or subtype.
tests.expected_result: 0 rows (all active rules have either TXN_TP_CD or TXN_SBTP_CD)
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID, TRLR_RULE_TXT
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND ACTV_F = 'Y'
  AND (END_DT IS NULL OR END_DT >= SYSDATE)
  AND TXN_TP_CD IS NULL
  AND TXN_SBTP_CD IS NULL

tests.title: Verify expired rules have END_DT in the past
tests.description: Per PBI: END_DT in the past indicates the rule has expired.
tests.expected_result: 0 rows — no rule with future END_DT should be inactive
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID, TRLR_RULE_TXT, END_DT, ACTV_F
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND ACTV_F = 'N'
  AND END_DT >= SYSDATE

tests.title: Verify SRC_PRGM breakdown for REC_TP=7
tests.description: Expected source programs: NULL (generic), NTWKACTV, BATKANDK per PBI scope.
tests.expected_result: 3 source programs with expected counts: NULL ~1029, NTWKACTV ~66, BATKANDK ~22
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT NVL(SRC_PRGM, '(null)') AS SRC_PRGM, COUNT(*) CNT
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
GROUP BY SRC_PRGM
ORDER BY CNT DESC

tests.title: Verify enabled TRAILER_REGEX_RULES exist
tests.description: Regex rules must be populated and enabled for trailer text normalization before matching.
tests.expected_result: Count > 0 of enabled rules ordered by APPLY_ORDER
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS enabled_regex_rules
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_REGEX_RULES
WHERE ENABLED = 'Y'

tests.title: Verify no duplicate APPLY_ORDER in TRAILER_REGEX_RULES
tests.description: Each regex rule should have a unique APPLY_ORDER to ensure deterministic processing.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT APPLY_ORDER, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_REGEX_RULES
WHERE ENABLED = 'Y'
GROUP BY APPLY_ORDER
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

tests.title: Verify each rule has PLACEHOLDER and REGEX defined
tests.description: Every enabled regex rule must have both a PLACEHOLDER and REGEX pattern.
tests.expected_result: 0 rows with null PLACEHOLDER or REGEX
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT RULE_ID, PLACEHOLDER, REGEX
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_REGEX_RULES
WHERE ENABLED = 'Y'
  AND (PLACEHOLDER IS NULL OR REGEX IS NULL)

tests.title: Verify CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG has recent data
tests.description: GoldenGate replication table should contain recent records for SIS stock movements.
tests.expected_result: Records exist with TGT_COMMIT_TS within last 7 days
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS recent_records
FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG
WHERE TGT_COMMIT_TS >= SYSDATE - 7

tests.title: Verify TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG is populated with trailer mapping results
tests.description: Staging table should contain trailer mapping output, joining STCCCALQ_GG with CDSM_RULE_MAP.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS stg_records
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG

tests.title: Verify CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID in staging refers to valid rules
tests.description: Every CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID in TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG should exist in CDSM_RULE_MAP.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS orphan_rules
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t
WHERE t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r
    WHERE r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID
  )

tests.title: Verify TXN_TP_CD is populated for matched rules
tests.description: When CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID is set, TXN_TP_CD should be populated from the rule.
tests.expected_result: 0 rows where CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID is set but TXN_TP_CD is NULL
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) cnt
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
WHERE CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND TXN_TP_CD IS NULL

tests.title: Verify SRC_PCS_TP_CD (CNX_IND) is consistent with rule output
tests.description: SRC_PCS_TP_CD in staging should match CNX_IND from matched CDSM_RULE_MAP rule.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mismatches
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t
JOIN CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r ON r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID
WHERE NVL(t.SRC_PCS_TP_CD, 'X') != NVL(r.CNX_IND, 'X')

tests.title: Verify TXN_SBTP_CD matches CDSM_RULE_MAP TXN_SBTP_CD
tests.description: Transaction subtype in staging should match the matched rule's SUBTYPE output.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mismatches
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t
JOIN CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r ON r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID
WHERE NVL(t.TXN_SBTP_CD, 'X') != NVL(r.TXN_SBTP_CD, 'X')

tests.title: Verify EXEC_SBTP_CD matches rule EXEC_SBTP_CD
tests.description: Execution subtype in staging should match the rule's output.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mismatches
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t
JOIN CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r ON r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID
WHERE NVL(t.EXEC_SBTP_CD, 'X') != NVL(r.EXEC_SBTP_CD, 'X')

tests.title: Verify no duplicate TXN_SRC_KEY in staging
tests.description: Each transaction source key should appear at most once in the staging table.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT TXN_SRC_KEY, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
GROUP BY TXN_SRC_KEY
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

tests.title: Verify trailer parsing applies only to S10DEL, S10REC, S10TFRS sources
tests.description: Per PBI: new logic applies to S10DEL, S10REC, S10TFRS. MULBULMT does not use trailer parsing.
tests.expected_result: Only S10DEL, S10REC, S10TFRS sources appear in trailer-mapped staging
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT DISTINCT t.TXN_SRC_KEY,
  SUBSTR(t.TXN_SRC_KEY, 1, INSTR(t.TXN_SRC_KEY, ':') - 1) AS inferred_source
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t
WHERE CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND ROWNUM <= 50

tests.title: Verify SBDI_MNY_TXN_QUALFR_SIS has recent data
tests.description: SIS-specific staging table for MNY_TXN_QUALFR should contain records.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS sis_rows
FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.SBDI_MNY_TXN_QUALFR_SIS

tests.title: Verify SRC_STM_CODE values in SIS staging
tests.description: SIS staging should contain stock movement sources (S10DEL, S10REC, S10TFRS).
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT SRC_STM_CODE, COUNT(*) CNT
FROM CCAL_REPL_OWNER.SBDI_MNY_TXN_QUALFR_SIS
WHERE SRC_STM_CODE IN ('S10DEL', 'S10REC', 'S10TFRS')
GROUP BY SRC_STM_CODE
ORDER BY SRC_STM_CODE

tests.title: Verify MNY_TXN_QUALFR target table has records
tests.description: Final target table for money transaction qualifier should contain records.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_records
FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR

tests.title: Verify no NULL FLOW_IND in MNY_TXN_QUALFR
tests.description: FLOW_IND (equivalent to direction indicator) should always be populated.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_flow_ind
FROM CCAL_OWNER.MNY_TXN_QUALFR
WHERE FLOW_IND IS NULL

tests.title: Compare Oracle trailer results with CDSMANUC test data
tests.description: Per acceptance criteria: new logic must reproduce same output as CDSMANUC. Compare with JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST test data.
tests.expected_result: TRANS_TP_CODE, TRANS_SBTP_CODE, EXEC_SBTP_CODE, CNX_IND match between old and new logic
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT t.TRAILER, t.TRANS_TP_CODE, t.TRANS_SBTP_CODE, t.EXEC_SBTP_CODE, t.CNX_IND,
  r.TXN_TP_CD AS NEW_TXN_TP, r.TXN_SBTP_CD AS NEW_TXN_SBTP, r.EXEC_SBTP_CD AS NEW_EXEC_SBTP, r.CNX_IND AS NEW_CNX
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST t
LEFT JOIN CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r
  ON UPPER(t.TRAILER) = UPPER(r.TRLR_RULE_TXT)
  AND r.REC_TP = 7
  AND r.ACTV_F = 'Y'
  AND (r.END_DT IS NULL OR r.END_DT >= SYSDATE)
WHERE t.RECORD_TYPE_MULTI = '7'
  AND ROWNUM <= 50

tests.title: Count mismatches between JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST and CDSM_RULE_MAP output
tests.description: All REC_TP=7 test cases in CDSMANUC test table should match the new rule output.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mismatches
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST t
JOIN CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r
  ON UPPER(t.TRAILER) = UPPER(r.TRLR_RULE_TXT)
  AND r.REC_TP = 7
  AND r.ACTV_F = 'Y'
  AND (r.END_DT IS NULL OR r.END_DT >= SYSDATE)
WHERE t.RECORD_TYPE_MULTI = '7'
  AND (
    NVL(t.TRANS_SBTP_CODE, 'X') != NVL(r.TXN_SBTP_CD, 'X')
    OR NVL(t.EXEC_SBTP_CODE, 'X') != NVL(r.EXEC_SBTP_CD, 'X')
  )

tests.title: Verify unmatched CDSMANUC test records
tests.description: Identify REC_TP=7 CDSMANUC test records that dont match any active rule in CDSM_RULE_MAP.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS unmatched_count
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.JBJ_CDSMANUC_TEST t
WHERE t.RECORD_TYPE_MULTI = '7'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r
    WHERE UPPER(t.TRAILER) = UPPER(r.TRLR_RULE_TXT)
      AND r.REC_TP = 7
      AND r.ACTV_F = 'Y'
      AND (r.END_DT IS NULL OR r.END_DT >= SYSDATE)
  )

tests.title: Verify TXN_TRLR staging counts match between SRC and TGT
tests.description: Number of transactions processed through trailer mapping should be consistent.
tests.expected_result: Source and staging counts are within expected tolerance
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG) AS stg_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NOT NULL) AS matched_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG WHERE CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NULL) AS unmatched_count
FROM DUAL

tests.title: Verify match rate for trailer mapping
tests.description: Percentage of transactions that match a rule should be reasonable (>50%).
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT
  ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS match_pct,
  COUNT(*) AS total
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG

tests.title: Verify TRAILER_DESC_LKU_STG has active records
tests.description: Trailer description lookup staging should have active records.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_descs
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_DESC_LKU_STG
WHERE ACT_FLAG = 'Y'

tests.title: Verify no duplicate TRAILER_DESC_CODE
tests.description: Each trailer description code should be unique.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT TRAILER_DESC_CODE, COUNT(*) cnt
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_DESC_LKU_STG
WHERE ACT_FLAG = 'Y'
GROUP BY TRAILER_DESC_CODE
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

tests.title: Verify no null TXN_SRC_KEY in TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
tests.description: Transaction source key is the grain of the trailer staging table and must never be null.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_keys
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
WHERE TXN_SRC_KEY IS NULL

tests.title: Verify CRT_DTM audit dates are populated in staging
tests.description: Audit columns should be populated for all records.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS null_crt
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
WHERE CRT_DTM IS NULL

tests.title: Verify rules with HAS_TOKENS=1 contain token placeholders
tests.description: Rules flagged as having tokens should contain placeholder patterns like ~DATE~, ~ACCT~, etc.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_token_rules
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND HAS_TOKENS = 1
  AND TRLR_RULE_TXT NOT LIKE '%~%~%'

tests.title: Verify REGEX_PATT is populated when HAS_TOKENS=1
tests.description: Rules with tokens should have a regex pattern for matching dynamic trailer text.
tests.expected_result: 0 rules with tokens but no regex
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS missing_regex
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND HAS_TOKENS = 1
  AND REGEX_PATT IS NULL

tests.title: Verify TXN_TP_CD values in staging are valid transaction type codes
tests.description: All TXN_TP_CD values written by trailer mapping should reference valid transaction types.
tests.expected_result: All codes are recognized CCAL transaction types
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT DISTINCT TXN_TP_CD, COUNT(*) CNT
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
WHERE TXN_TP_CD IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY TXN_TP_CD
ORDER BY CNT DESC
FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

tests.title: Verify distinct TXN_SBTP_CD values from trailer mapping
tests.description: Distribution of transaction subtypes assigned by trailer rules.
tests.expected_result: Expected TSTP subtype codes like TSTP0295, TSTP0298, etc.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT DISTINCT TXN_SBTP_CD, COUNT(*) CNT
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
WHERE TXN_SBTP_CD IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY TXN_SBTP_CD
ORDER BY CNT DESC
FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY

tests.title: Verify TXN_TRLR staging EXEC_TP_CD distribution
tests.description: Execution type codes assigned by trailer rules.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT NVL(EXEC_TP_CD, '(null)') AS EXEC_TP_CD, COUNT(*) CNT
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG
GROUP BY EXEC_TP_CD
ORDER BY CNT DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

tests.title: Verify MULBULMT does not use trailer parsing
tests.description: Per PBI: MULBULMT does not use trailer parsing. Should not appear in trailer-mapped results.
tests.expected_result: 0 rows for MULBULMT in trailer staging with a matched rule
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS mulbulmt_in_trlr
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TXN_TRLR_STCCCALQ_STG t
WHERE t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID IS NOT NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP r
    WHERE r.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID = t.CDSM_RULE_MAP_ID
      AND r.SRC_PRGM = 'MULBULMT'
  )

tests.title: Verify BATKANDK changes are deferred
tests.description: Per PBI: BATKANDK written by REOCDS2B do not require changes at this point.
tests.expected_result: BATKANDK rules exist but should not be actively modified by this PBI
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS batkandk_rules
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND SRC_PRGM = 'BATKANDK'
  AND ACTV_F = 'Y'

tests.title: Verify mny_txn_qualfr_log table exists and is populated
tests.description: Log table for MNY_TXN_QUALFR changes should track trailer mapping updates.
tests.sql_validation: SELECT table_name, num_rows FROM all_tables WHERE table_name LIKE '%MNY_TXN_QUALFR_LOG%'

tests.title: Verify EFF_DT <= END_DT for all active rules
tests.description: Effective date must be before or equal to end date for valid rules.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS invalid_dates
FROM CCAL_OWNER.CDSM_RULE_MAP
WHERE REC_TP = 7
  AND ACTV_F = 'Y'
  AND END_DT IS NOT NULL
  AND EFF_DT > END_DT

tests.title: Verify TRAILER_REGEX_RULES APPLY_ORDER has no gaps causing processing issues
tests.description: Apply order should be sequential without unexpected gaps.
tests.sql_validation:
SELECT RULE_ID, APPLY_ORDER, PLACEHOLDER, NOTES
FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.TRAILER_REGEX_RULES
WHERE ENABLED = 'Y'
ORDER BY APPLY_ORDER
